name: Weight Watchers Pumpkin Pudding
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup or more Cool Whip (or less)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the instant pudding and milk until thickened.
2. Add the butterscotch pudding mix, pumpkin puree, vanilla extract, pumpkin pie spice, and cinnamon to the pudding mixture.
3. Fold in the Cool Whip until well combined.
4. Transfer the mixture to a serving dish or individual containers.
5. Refrigerate for at least 2 hours before serving to allow it to set.
6. Enjoy your chilled Pumpkin Pudding! For best results, double the recipe and use a larger can of pumpkin puree (up to 32 oz). The pudding will last in the refrigerator for up to one week if stored properly.
